creator: jerry.jacobs@xor-gate.org
text:
It is very easy with modern browsers to auto-switch to dark/normal theme if prefered. With some javascript/CSS query to detect the OS dark mode preference:

https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/CSS/@media/prefers-color-scheme
https://usefulangle.com/post/318/javascript-check-dark-mode-activated
